クラス VectorizedEnvironment

java.lang.Object
mechanics.rl.bridge.VectorizedEnvironment
public class VectorizedEnvironment extends Object
Manages many independent battle environments behind one runner id.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • VectorizedEnvironment

      public VectorizedEnvironment(int count, Supplier<CombatSimulator> simulatorFactory, EpisodeConfig config)

    • VectorizedEnvironment

      public VectorizedEnvironment(int count, Supplier<CombatSimulator> simulatorFactory, EpisodeConfig config, int requestedWorkers)

    • VectorizedEnvironment

      public VectorizedEnvironment(int count, RLEpisodeFactory episodeFactory, int requestedWorkers, ObservationEncoder observationEncoder)

    • VectorizedEnvironment

      public VectorizedEnvironment(int count, Supplier<CombatSimulator> simulatorFactory, EpisodeConfig config, int requestedWorkers, ObservationEncoder observationEncoder)
      Constructs a vectorized environment with a shared ObservationEncoder. Use this overload to avoid reloading capability profiles for each environment instance.
      パラメータ:
      count - number of parallel environments
      simulatorFactory - factory for creating combat simulators
      config - episode configuration
      requestedWorkers - number of parallel worker threads (0 = auto)
      observationEncoder - shared observation encoder to use for all environments
